full_text:
Ding Fei (Wenhou) 丁斐 (文侯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Fei (丁斐), styledWenhou (文侯). Magistrate of Weinan. Set free animals at Tong Gate to confuse Ma Chao’s army. Ding Fei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
